query:
SELECT 'orgNotes' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM orgNotes WHERE organizationId = 990001 AND createdAt >= '2026-04-09'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'intakeFile' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001 AND createdAt >= '2026-04-09'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
